pin.lockedRetryMinutes:
Too many failed attempts.

Try again in {{minutes}} minutes.
pin.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 4 characters
pin.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.
pin.emergencyCallError: Unable to open the emergency dialer.
pin.rotationLockUnavailable: Rotation lock is not available on this device right now.
pin.rotationLockError: Unable to change rotation lock state.

general.returnOnInactivity: Return to Start Page on Inactivity
general.scrollTop: Scroll to Top on Start Page
general.hDisplayMode: Website, media player (video/images), or Android application
general.hLeaveEmptyDuration: Leave empty to use default duration
general.hAutoPlay: Automatically start playing when the screen loads
general.hLoop: Restart the playlist from the beginning when it ends
general.hImgDuration: How long to display each image (1-3600s). Per-image override available above.
general.hControls: Show play/pause, next/prev controls (tap screen to toggle)
general.hBgColor: Hex color for areas not covered by media (e.g. #000000 for black)
general.hCrossfade: Smooth fade transition between media items
general.hDashboard: Replace single URL with a multi-URL dashboard
general.hUsername: Username for HTTP Basic Auth (401 challenges)
general.hPassword: Stored in the device Keychain (not in plain text)
general.hRotationInterval: Time between each URL change (minimum 5 seconds)
general.hScheduled: Display specific URLs at scheduled times
general.hPackage: Enter package name or select an app
general.hAdvancedPass: Enable alphanumeric passwords with special characters. Disable for numeric PIN only (4-6 digits).
general.hMaxAttempts: Number of incorrect password attempts allowed (1-100)
general.hReturnInactivity: Automatically navigate back to the start URL when the screen hasn't been touched for a set duration
general.hInactivityTimeout: Time in seconds before returning to start page (5-3600)
general.hResetTimer: Restart the inactivity timer when a new page loads within the WebView
general.hClearCache: Clear the WebView cache when returning to the start page (full reload)
general.hScrollTop: Smoothly scroll back to the top of the page when already on the start page
general.hReloadOnError: Automatically reload the page on network error
general.hInlinePdf: Display PDF files directly in the browser instead of downloading them
general.hPrinting: Enable window.print() support for web pages (label printers, receipts, etc.)
general.hBackButton: Show a floating button to navigate back in web history (NOT app navigation)
general.infoNoMedia: ⚠️ Add at least one media item to use the Media Player
general.infoDashboardActive: Dashboard mode is active. Configure your tiles in the Dashboard tab.
general.infoNeed2Urls: ⚠️ Add at least 2 URLs to enable rotation
general.infoHttpWarning:
⚠️ SECURITY: This URL uses HTTP (unencrypted).
Your data can be intercepted. Use HTTPS instead.

display.hAutoBright: Automatically adjust screen brightness based on ambient light
display.hOffset: Added to calculated auto-brightness (e.g. +10% makes it always a bit brighter)
display.hEnableSaver: Activate screensaver after a period of inactivity
display.hReadOnly: The page is shown read-only; tap anywhere to wake
display.hLoopEnd: Restart from the beginning when the playlist ends
display.hSaverBright: Screen brightness when screensaver is active
display.hSaverDelay: Time in minutes before screensaver activates
display.hMotionWake: Wake screen when motion is detected by the camera
display.hSensitivity: Higher sensitivity triggers on smaller movements
display.hSelectCamera: Select which camera to use for motion detection
display.hSchedule: Automatically turn screen off/on at scheduled times to save energy
display.hWakeTouch: Allow the screen to wake up temporarily when touched during a scheduled sleep period
display.hStatusBar: Display battery, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, volume and time at the top of the screen
display.hStatusTheme: Choose a dark or light style for icons and text
display.hStatusOverlay: Show status bar overlay on top of the external app
display.hStatusReturn: Show status bar on the 'External App Running' screen
display.hZoomApply: How the zoom level is applied to the page
display.hDisableZoom: Prevent pinch-to-zoom and double-tap zoom on the web page. The admin zoom level above still applies.
display.hPauseMedia: Pause web page audio and video when the screensaver is shown, the screen turns off, or the app goes to the background — otherwise a web radio or video could keep playing unreachable in the background. Turn off to keep web audio playing continuously.
display.h2way: Enable for WebRTC 2-way audio / talk-back (e.g. a Home Assistant / go2rtc doorbell intercom card). While the web page is actively using the microphone, FreeKiosk switches the device to communication audio mode so the microphone back-channel transmits, then restores normal audio when you stop talking. Leave off for normal browsing — it only engages while the mic is in use.
display.hKeyboard: Control which keyboard appears for input fields
display.hShowWebPage: Show a web page (clock, dashboard, HTML)
display.hSlideshow: Play a video or image slideshow
display.hZoomDoc: Zooms the whole document (html). Recommended for most websites.
display.hZoomBody: Zooms the page body instead, the same way HADashboard does — Home Assistant dashboards re-flow their cards and fill the screen.
display.hNumericOnly: Detect and convert numeric fields only
display.iAutoWake: When the screen is turned off (e.g. by a short power button press), it will automatically turn back on after a brief flicker. Useful for kiosk devices where the power button cannot be physically blocked.
display.iNoRules: No rules configured yet. Add a rule to define when the screen should turn off.
display.iLayout: Layout: items are positioned left and right to avoid the center camera area
